goal: Create the opus-powered resolver agent, export worktree functions from the memory API, and add validation for the worktree session schema.

tasks.name: Create Resolver Agent Definition
tasks.action: Create resolver.md with opus model, conflict resolution instructions, read-both-sides cycle, verify-both-tasks step, and escalation rules.

tasks.name: Export Worktree Functions from Memory API
tasks.action: Add create_session, merge_session, cleanup_session, get_conflict_context, load_session, save_session to __all__ and as lazy-import wrapper functions.
verify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory import create_session, merge_session, cleanup_session, load_session; print('PASS')"

tasks.name: Validation + WORKFLOW.json Config
tasks.action: Add worktreeMode validation in workflow_validate.py, add _validate_worktree_session() for .cnogo/worktree-session.json schema, add worktreeMode: always to WORKFLOW.json.

planVerify: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from scripts.memory import create_session, merge_session, cleanup_session; print('PASS')"
commitMessage:
feat(worktree-parallel-agents): resolver agent, API exports, and validation

- Add .claude/agents/resolver.md (opus model for conflict resolution)
- Export worktree functions from scripts/memory/__init__.py
- Add worktree session schema validation to workflow_validate.py
- Add worktreeMode config to WORKFLOW.json
